reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): Entry point is local configuration file (BLOB_SCHEDULE), which is SEMI_TRUSTED per trust_assumptions.local_validator and explicitly marked as out-of-scope for bug bounty (in_scope_for_bug_bounty: false). The attack scenario requires operator error (loading a malicious config file), which is excluded per 'Configuration issues requiring operator error are typically out-of-scope'. This finding relies on a trust assumption violation that is conditionally out of scope.
